species.complicated_bees.reclamation:des: ...oud and noble, but can no longe...
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:nat: Attuned to nature, these bees can raise the natural aura present in an area by simply existing.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:bot: Even further attuned to nature, these bees need special flowers to live.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:daw: A special hybrid between the Medepis and Aesapis branch, these bees remind many of dwarven industry.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:sou: Capable of crystallizing ambient source with nothing more than mystical flower pollen.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:wil: Extremely stubborn, these bees are absolutely certain nothing can stop them as long as they keep trying.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:dem: Notably, some members of this species display a unique stripe pattern that looks somewhat like a celtic cross.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:ter: Rumored to be blessed by Gaia herself, this species can coalesce botanic mana in the air into a light and malleable metal.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:arg: Activity patterns tied to the moon. During a new moon, they are almost entirely invisible.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:osm: Extremely hard but exceedingly brittle. They also tend to build overly-complicated structures.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:sta: Staunch and easily alloyed. Useful in machinery.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:rad: Somehow always warm to the touch. Do not use as a belt buckle.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:zin: Found in blood. Do not try to extract from blood.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:flu: Now this is one groovy crystal right here...
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:wat: These bees are squishy, thanks to a special exoskeleton material.
species.complicated_bees.reclamation:mol: Hot to the touch, these little guys are almost as heatproof as tardigrades.
description.agricraft.reclamation.cupros: A special flower that can harvest trace amounts of copper from water.
quark.jei.hint.matrix_enchanting: Can be used to enchant things.
